text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: Yawn... H-huh?!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: Where am I? It's pretty and all, but...

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan (?)
text_block_list.text:
Hello! And welcome to the Adorable ☆
Universe! ♪

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan (?)
text_block_list.text:
It's a special space just for cute lil' Falco, who's
aspiring to be the world's cutest Umadol!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
A-Adorable ☆ Universe?! Wait a minute. Why are
you here, Curren Chan?

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan (?)
text_block_list.text:
Ehehe. Well, I know you're always doing your best
to become your cutest self.

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan (?)
text_block_list.text:
And in response to your super cute efforts, I've
prepared a super cute present for you!

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan (?)
text_block_list.text:
Now! Let the light of the Cute ☆ Beam wash over
you and feel your cuteness level rise!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Shiiing! ☆

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: Wh-whoooa! This is i-incredible!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
I can feel the power of cuteness flowing directly
into my body!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
With this, I'm definitely going to become the
cutest top Umadol! ♪

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text: Falcon... Wake up, Falcon...

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: Ngh... What is it?

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
Huh? Flash? What happened? I thought I was in
that Universe beam thingy...

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
...It sounds like you were having a dream. In any
case, I suggest you get up and change.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
There's approximately twenty minutes and five
seconds before the school bell rings... You'll be
late if you don't hurry.

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
Oh... I see... So everything that happened was just
a dream.

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
But I still feel the power of cuteness in me! I know
I can make it before the bell! ☆

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Thanks to this experience, Smart Falcon improves
her running.
